# 小米主题 `xiaomi`

品牌橙，来自小米标志色，明亮活力橙。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #FF6900;
    --primary-dark:  #CC4400;
    --primary-light: #FF8C38;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF3EC;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(255, 105, 0, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #7A2800 0%, #CC4400 35%, #FF6900 65%, #FF9040 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #7A2800 0%, #CC4400 50%, #FF6900 100%);
    --red:           #E1251B;
    --green:         #00B96B;
    --orange:        #FF6900;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7A2800 0%, #CC4400 50%, #FF6900 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #7A2800 0%, #CC4400 35%, #FF6900 65%, #FF9040 100%) !important; }
```
